mapper.select: SELECT id, from_user_id, to_user_id, status, message, created_at, updated_at FROM friend_requests WHERE from_user_id = #{fromUserId} AND to_user_id = #{toUserId} AND status = #{status} ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT id, from_user_id, to_user_id, status, message, created_at, updated_at FROM friend_requests WHERE to_user_id = #{toUserId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT id, from_user_id, to_user_id, status, message, created_at, updated_at FROM friend_requests WHERE from_user_id = #{fromUserId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
